Some time prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sector]] was represented in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] by a '''[[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]'''. She was known for pandering to [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] every demand.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 13|''Empire'' 13]] {{1stm}}
